claim_evidence_links.claim_text: Jeff is a CLI-first persisted-runtime v1 backbone.
Its strengths include truthful inspection, bounded `/run`, approval-gated continuation, research support, and anti-drift coverage.
Jeff is not a GUI, a broad API surface, an autonomous continuation system, or a broad memo.

evidence_items.claim: Jeff is a CLI-first persisted-runtime v1 backbone.

findings: Jeff is a CLI-first persisted-runtime v1 backbone.
Its strengths include truthful inspection, bounded `/run`, approval-gated continuation, research support, and anti-drift coverage.
Jeff is not a GUI, a broad API surface, an autonomous continuation system, or a broad memo.
inference: Jeff is designed for targeted, controlled execution and inspection rather than autonomous or wide-scale interface applications.
summary: Evidence extracted for this bounded research output remains inspectable with provenance preserved.
title: Evidence bundle: summary
uncertainty: No explicit uncertainties identified from the provided evidence.
